creator: utisoft@googlemail.com
text:
Ok, having had a look at the patch I see what's going on. Sorry, was
in a hurry this morning, and I thought it was the patches to get v4
working again.

Looks like Rob Farmer (I'm guessing aka b.f.) did a load of the work
I've been doing, and created a load of ports for the dependencies
(more quickly too :S)

Some of these ports (skinlf, jgraphx, jeuclid-fop, javahelp) are
already submitted by me, and some approved under different port
categories.

These patches presumably work, so I'll give my blessing to them, but
some of the dependencies aren't under the right path.

I'll leave it open to Rob to fix the dependencies, unless he asks me
to. I'll talk to him about it directly as well.

Thanks,

Chris
